items.headline: Roadworks Planned Across Tandridge Over the Coming Week
items.summary: Surrey County Council has listed the highway works due across the Tandridge area from today until the end of next week. The details come from the council's weekly highways bulletin, which covers planned roadworks in and around Oxted and Hurst Green.
